creator: stefan.thurner@mb.tu-chemnitz.de
text:
Hi,

I can confirm this. My hardware is a GeForce 6600 and an 
EIZO S1910 conected via DVI.

I found out that this monitor uses DMPM instead of DMPS to 
switch the monitor off when using DVI. May be it's still not 
implemented in green_saver.

regards
-Stefan
